verdict_reasoning: HSPA5 (BiP/GRP78) is canonically an ER-luminal chaperone, but it has extensive documented cell-surface display on tumor cells and stressed cells (cell-surface GRP78, csGRP78). This ecto-GRP78 pool is a well-validated cancer target with multiple clinical-stage antibody, ADC, and peptide-drug-conjugate programs directed at the surface form. The mechanism involves ER-stress / UPR-induced relocalization to the outer leaflet of tumor and stressed cells, fitting cell_state_induced (oncogenic transformation + ER stress). Baseline ER residency dominates in normal cells, but the cancer-cell ecto-pool is the surface story.
